Bash(cd "/c/Users/Fernando Prada/OneDrive - SVAN TRADING SL/Escritorio/Personal/Proyectos/TaxIA" && set -a && source .env && set +a && PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONPATH=backend venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import asyncio
from app.database.turso_client import TursoClient

async def main\(\):
    db = TursoClient\(\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    result = await db.execute\(\\"SELECT id, email, name, subscription_status, subscription_plan, is_active, grace_period_until, created_at FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Palomares%' OR name LIKE '%Ramon%'\\", []\)
    if result.rows:
        for r in result.rows:
            print\(dict\(r\)\)
    else:
        print\('No encontrado por nombre, buscando todos los recientes...'\)
        result2 = await db.execute\(\\"SELECT id, email, name, subscription_status, subscription_plan, is_active, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5\\", []\)
        for r in result2.rows:
            print\(dict\(r\)\)
    await db.disconnect\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
from app.database.turso_client import TursoClient

async def main\(\):
    db = TursoClient\(\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    result = await db.execute\('SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\" AND name=\\"users\\"', []\)
    for r in result.rows:
        print\(r\)
    await db.disconnect\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('logs.1773254642371.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
for i in range\(170, len\(data\)\):
    msg = data[i].get\('message', ''\).replace\('\\n',' '\)
    sev = data[i].get\('severity', ''\)
    attrs = data[i].get\('attributes', {}\)
    path = attrs.get\('path', ''\)
    detail = str\(attrs.get\('detail', ''\)\).replace\('\\n',' '\)
    extra = f' path={path}' if path else ''
    extra += f' detail={detail[:200]}' if detail else ''
    print\(f'[{i}] [{sev}] {msg[:300]}{extra}'\)
" 2>&1)
